claim_boundary: This is negative prefix evidence only; it does not satisfy G005 or any full-corpus paper-target win.
diagnosis: Compact luma-window video tokens are available and train on H200, but flat video projection still underfits sparse key/button events on the 20k prefix.
No-button FPR stays below the renewed hard target on this shard prefix (0.03385 <= 0.10), but mouse-button recall/F1 remain 0.0.
The next recipe-aligned branch should replace the flat luma projection with a compact luma-window CNN/video encoder while keeping typed masked action-token planes.
next_action: Run the compact-luma-window CNN masked-diffusion IDM prefix probe after code validation; do not revive state/action-prior shortcuts as G005 completion candidates.
